GN[OGS Alan Turing 2010 (Main Class), Round 2 Group 1]
C[Uberdude: I decided to play high this game (instead of my usual territory style) because Gu Li plays d14 a lot.
C[Uberdude: I like this joseki for black, so much cash and white floating
C[Uberdude: But at least this works with d14
C[Uberdude: The purpose of this move is I want to play the thick c7 soon.
C[Uberdude: Black racing ahead on points.

C[Uberdude: I seem to recall I also considered c7 here. c7 is really big because not only does it make the d7 cut rubbish it also thickens white and reduces black eyespace potential at c7 or b8, which in turn means that c2 becomes white's sente. But it seemed a bit slow and g15 looked fun and consistent with my high strategy.

C[Uberdude: I think this is your first mistake, I expected g16 defence. Then h15 h16 and w has to chose between f15 or e17 or maybe tenuki. Yes it's nice for me to develop centre, but you can still invade left side and you gain some points and strength (e.g. l17 is less good for me as no longer aims at h17) on top.

C[Uberdude: ...as I'm quite happy to answer here. Often in this shape when white makes the thick c7 black answers at d2 immediately as a reverse sente and it also creates f2 clamp aji so white is very small on the lower side (white's honte at f3 is too slow particularly with k2 open and painful to give d2 in sente).
C[Uberdude: Weird move, you are worried about white centre? Seems rather premature, play g16 or e10 or b14 or whatever opening move.
C[Uberdude: Very nice to get that in sente, was c10 really worth it?
C[Uberdude: c2 sente makes this a much better move.

C[Uberdude: I was surprised you didn't m4 which aks white whether he l5 or l4. I would probably l5, but then there is a cut at k5 (if I block l2 at k2 and save l3 rather than giving a big ko) for black to use, for example it makes k7 a better move.
b14 is another idea to get more eyespace (if b16 then c12, though I can try c13 b13 b12 to cut).
C[Uberdude: This cut is so huge
C[Uberdude: I didn't like b14 if I d19
C[Uberdude: Good, I wanted you to play c16 and b17 to live in gote in the corner and give me b14 to attack c12 at e10 afterwards.
C[Uberdude: This treats m7 as a liability, q9 in sente is so nice. e10 would be a nice point and aims at e8 peep.
C[Uberdude: Submissive, particularly as b7 is my sente (wouldn't be if you had d2). I'd come out at e11 or e12.

C[Uberdude: If r3 my plan was crosscut which looks like it gets something, and if r5 then I expected q3 p4 and then s3 to live, but I missed that q3 can be answered at p3 and although I get a nice atari cut I seem to be dead. So 3-3 should be better. In this 2 knight's move shape 3-3 is theoretically dead, but with q9 and m5 the aji is very bad so hard to kill. I would expect a ko.
C[Uberdude: If q9 weren't there you can kill this shape with s5 s4 s2, but s6 is my sente now for s8 clamp so doesn't work here.
C[Uberdude: Wow, I took corner in sente, didn't expect that! But then I realised maybe you were scared of q5 and p6 cut, but that would have been a ladder if you didn't play t6.
C[Uberdude: I wanted to play k7, but although p8 was slow it does mean black can invade at q11 with more power so this is defending my weakness to make a safe win.

C[Uberdude: Again you gave me sente: the purpose of q11 was not to make points here, but to connect and eliminate b's only chance of winning which was a splitting attack on q9 and q14. Instead k7 (preceded by m4) or h18 are the big points. Also s14 is stronger shape.
C[Uberdude: Nice shape point, making s13 work. This did make me a bit regret not playing n10 instead of k7, but one can't have everything =)
C[Uberdude: Really huge as threatens to bring corner back to life. And if I got it I have followups in the top side.
C[Uberdude: The purpose of this move is to set up the k15 l17 combo.

C[Uberdude: You could defend the top side, but it's painfully submissive. Instead e17 would be a good probe, asking if I want to fight a huge picnic ko or let you connect. If you connect then it makes the l17 cut less dangerous.
Uberdude: Or you could jump in at g8 which would be annoying as it's hard to kill with e17 there.
C[Uberdude: I couldn't decide if this or e17 was bigger, but as you hadn't played there yet I figured maybe you had missed that and I'd get it later
C[Uberdude: Good to fix in sente, if you don't then h12 is devastating thanks to e11. That's the problem making so many small groups, I get good yose all over the place.
C[Uberdude: I was pleased to capture m16 in sente as your connection was pretty sente. And dangerous to lose j18 half eye.
